testInfo.summary: This test case checks for the proper error handling during the standard credential issuance flow using an emulated wallet when an invalid c_nonce is used. Note: This test requires a credential configuration that requires cryptographic binding (proof). If the selected credential configuration does not require proof, the test will be skipped.

results.response_body: {"credential_issuer":"https://issuer.lab.fikua.com","authorization_servers":["https://issuer.lab.fikua.com"],"credential_endpoint":"https://issuer.lab.fikua.com/oid4vci/v1/credential","nonce_endpoint":"https://issuer.lab.fikua.com/oid4vci/v1/nonce","notification_endpoint":"https://issuer.lab.fikua.com/oid4vci/v1/notification","credential_response_encryption":{"encryption_required":false,"enc_values_supported":["A128GCM","A256GCM"],"alg_values_supported":["ECDH-ES"]},"batch_credential_issuance":{"batch_size":1},"credential_configurations_supported":{"eu.europa.ec.eudi.pid.1":{"format":"dc+sd-jwt","scope":"eu.europa.ec.eudi.pid.1","cryptographic_binding_methods_supported":["jwk"],"credential_signing_alg_values_supported":["ES256"],"proof_types_supported":{"jwt":{"proof_signing_alg_values_supported":["ES256"]}},"vct":"eu.europa.ec.eudi.pid.1","credential_metadata":{"display":[{"name":"EUDI PID","description":"EU Digital Identity Personal Identification Data","locale":"en"}],"claims":[{"display":[{"locale":"en","name":"Given Name"}],"path":["given_name"]},{"display":[{"locale":"en","name":"Surname"}],"path":["family_name"]},{"display":[{"locale":"en","name":"Date of Birth"}],"path":["birth_date"]},{"display":[{"locale":"en","name":"Issuing Authority"}],"path":["issuing_authority"]},{"display":[{"locale":"en","name":"Issuing Country"}],"path":["issuing_country"]}]}}},"display":[{"locale":"en","name":"Fikua Lab Issuer"}]}
